The Parisian side struggled after conceding two goals in the first half and Gianluigi Donnarumma was at the center with errors. Donnarumma made two mistakes that resulted in goals for the home side. arts.ttl: David Dein pushes for new match rule which will affect Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: The average length of time a ball is in play in the Premier League and most Western European games is around about 55 to 57 minutes. However, the 81-year-old's innovative proposal includes having a timekeeper halt the clock to prevent 'wasted time', which could actually extend the amount of active play by eliminating delays due to injuries, VAR reviews, and other interruptions.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives injury update on 'unbelievable' Arsenal star after substitution vs PSG
